author: SantiMod
content:
@everyone 

 Star Atlas Community Survey: 

If you're a member of the Star Atlas community, take a moment to answer a few questions about SCORE, spaceships & help improve the metaverse: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSdKGoPt6lmNpidPkHYnTyy2lGkQi7s-vVxjXSkYg_fjNw5CRg/viewform  

You'll also have a chance to win a recently assembled Fimbul Airbike!
